data.title: Laboratory Corp Q3 Earnings Beat Street View, Investors Overlook Hurricane Helene Impact
data.description: LabCorp Q3 2024 EPS beats expectations at $3.50, with 7.4% revenue growth to $3.28B. Adjusted EPS guidance revised due to weather.

data.title: Virtu Financial Q3: Earnings Beat, Revenue Surge, Dividend Payout & More
data.description: Virtu Financial beat Q3 earnings expectations with an adjusted EPS of 82 cents, declared a 24-cent dividend, and saw trading income rise 40.5%.
